summary: Tested both bug fixes: (1) drag_menu_under ad slot max-width constraint and (2) sidebar sticky behavior. All checks passed.

sticky_sidebar.scroll_1500: top=-89px — past aside container bottom (expected CSS sticky behavior, NOT a bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working. drag_menu_under is max 336px on all pages. Sticky sidebar (160x600) works correctly at top=80px when scrolling within the aside container. The aside stretches to full content height (1879px). Both persistent-ad slots always present in DOM.
